title: hieracium scabriusculum var. scabrum
intro: Hieracium scabriusculum var. scabrum, also known as the rough hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its yellow or reddish flowers and hairy leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Hieracium scabriusculum var. scabrum include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
